name: Walking Lunge
resistance_profile: Dynamic single-leg loading for quads and glutes.
cues: Drop the back knee toward the floor
Drive up through the front heel
execution_steps: Stand tall holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Step forward into a long stride and drop your back knee toward the floor.
Keep your torso upright and your front knee tracking over your foot.
Drive through the front heel to bring the rear foot forward into the next stride.
Continue alternating legs across the floor for the target reps.
good_when: You want a dynamic single-leg movement that hits quads and glutes.
You're adding unilateral work and some conditioning to a leg day.
You're evening out left/right strength differences under load.
bad_when: You have limited space or balance issues (use split squats or lunges in place).
You want a stable platform for maximal quad overload (use leg press or hack squat).
